name: Chinese Duck Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 (or more) Serrano peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first set of ingredients in a saucepan and cook over moderate heat for 5 minutes.
2. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
3. In a separate saucepan, combine the second set of ingredients and boil for 10 minutes.
4. Add the contents of the third set to the saucepan with the cooked first mixture.
5. Simmer all together for 45 minutes.
6. Remove the cinnamon stick.
7. Puree the mixture in a food processor.
8. Return the pureed mixture to the saucepan and simmer until thick.
9. Transfer the sauce to sterilized mason jars, cap loosely, and let cool.
10. Tighten the caps and allow the sauce to stand in the dark for at least 2 weeks before using.
